MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Stephen J. Sherman, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Kendall Young. Default entered against Defendant David Forbes. There being no appearance by co-defendant, David Desbians, the request for jury trial is stricken and trial date is confirmed.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Continued To Jan-16-03 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 218
